Study Title: IRX-2, Cyclophosphamide, and Pembrolizumab in Treating Participants With Recurrent or Metastatic Gastric or Gastroesophageal Junction Cancer
Target/Biomarker: PD-1, PD-L1, PD-L1 expression by the Combined Positive Score (CPS)
Trial Summary: This completed phase Ib/II trial investigated the combination of IRX-2, cyclophosphamide, and pembrolizumab in treating recurrent or metastatic gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer. The study is relevant to the gastric cancer landscape as it explores the synergistic potential of combining immunotherapy with chemotherapy, potentially offering a novel therapeutic approach for these challenging cancer types.

Study Title: A Study of IMU-131 (HER-Vaxx) in Combination With Chemotherapy or Pembrolizumab in Patients With Metastatic HER2/Neu Over-Expressing Gastric Cancer (nextHERIZON)
Trial Summary: The trial titled "A Study of IMU-131 (HER-Vaxx) in Combination With Chemotherapy or Pembrolizumab in Patients With Metastatic HER2/Neu Over-Expressing Gastric Cancer" was a Phase 2, open-label study designed to explore the efficacy of IMU-131 in combination with chemotherapy or pembrolizumab in a small cohort of patients. Despite its termination, the trial remains of interest due to its focus on HER2/neu over-expressing gastric cancer, a challenging subset of gastric cancer, and its exploration of novel therapeutic combinations that could inform future research directions.
